title: ResponsePacket
description: Schema for a ResponsePacket — return material from the candidate evaluation pipeline. Not app apply, not external send, not correctness proof.

selected_candidate_ref.description: Reference to the selected candidate artifact

candidate_dna_ref.description: Reference to the CandidateDNA lineage of the selected candidate

tournament_summary_ref.description: Reference to the tournament selection summary

final_gate_advisory_ref.description: Reference to the Final Gate Advisory for the selected candidate

receipt_boundary_ref.description: Reference to the Receipt Boundary record

user_visible_output_ref.description: Reference to the user-visible output candidate

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence supporting this response packet

known_gaps.description: Known gaps, missing evidence, or unresolved items

commands_run.description: Commands that were actually run during evaluation

commands_not_run.description: Commands that were not run and why

tests_not_run.description: Tests that were not run and why

claims_made.description: Explicit claims made in this response packet

claims_not_made.description: Explicit claims NOT made — non-claims distinguished from claims_made

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this response packet does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — response packet is return material, not applied output

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this response packet does not claim or prove
